title: FCW Compose Output Schema (fcw-compose-v1.0)
description: Output schema for the FCW Composer stage. Sprint C.E Phase 1 structural parity to AGM (AD-2026-04-24n). Consumed by publisher.py (builds report-YYYY-MM-DD.json weekly_brief_draft + claim_trace[] sidecar) and by the Step 2 Reviewer gate.

composed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Stamped by engine; may be null at emit time.

composed_from_file.description: Filename of the interpret output this compose consumed. Typically interpret-latest.json or interpret-YYYY-MM-DD.json.

cycle_disposition.description: Mirrored from Interpreter._meta.cycle_disposition. Engine re-stamps — prompt may emit as best-effort.

composer_flags.description: Optional. Wanted-claim flags for the Reviewer gate. Format: wanted-claim: <description>.

composer_error.description: Engine-stamped. True when the Composer fallback stub wrote due to parse or API error.

weekly_brief_draft.description: 800-1200 word structured markdown narrative. Four sections: ## Lead Signal / ## Other Developments / ## Cross-Monitor Connections / ## Outlook. Null-cycle renders 600-900 words acknowledging absence of material FIMI change. Empty string only in fallback stub.

claim_trace.description: Per-span provenance for weekly_brief_draft. Every factual span must have a trace entry. Structural sentences get trace_type=structural, trace_ref=null.

brief_excerpt.description: The prose span this trace covers. Reviewer gate validates weekly_brief_draft[start:end] == brief_excerpt.

trace_ref.description: The claim_id from Interpreter.structured_claims[] (when trace_type=claim_id), the kb_entry_id from the living KB (when trace_type=kb_entry_id), or null (when trace_type=structural).

surface_drift_jaccard.description: Jaccard similarity of content words between brief_excerpt and the source triple canonical form. Required (non-null) for trace_type=claim_id. Null for kb_entry_id and structural.

_raw_fallback.description: Raw output captured when the Composer fallback stub wrote. Engine-populated.
